creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237501
x11-fm/nemo - updating to 5.4.3

nemo is now available in a release 5.4.3

The attached diff will update the port to changeset more recent than 5.4.3 and on the same branch as 5.4.3. The rationale for this was to use a newer available source tree, since I was updating the port locally

There may be a newer changeset available from the linuxmint nemo project. Release 5.4.3 is the latest numerically-versioned release

This patch would correspond to a patch to be published shortly, for x11/cinnamon and other ports from linuxmint in updating to a 5.4 series release
